reviews.review_msg: worst prof
dude jsut stay away form her

This professor is extremely difficult and has a harsh grading style that feels unnecessarily strict. She doesn't seem invested in her students' success and can be unapproachable when it comes to answering questions
fr tho, how is she still teaching? she will answer questions in the rudest way possible and is just overall not helpful.
just stay away from her.
The average rating speaks for itself. She wants students failing her class
this prof makes the class very boring
Very unorganized lectures. Pretty much just reading from slides, not engaging at all.
Smh do not take
Honestly so boring
Worst teacher at sfu
Never take

For 199w- she requires to use a  tracking changes tool on word. The tracking tool just makes it easier for the prof and TA to read the final paper a lot faster and easier. It also makes edits visible. Which imo is incredibly stupid as we used to hand in physical papers. Gave me 37 percent for having the tool and refused to read the paper.

In-person ENGL 199;
1Expects a first year student to write a research paper with her horrible instructions. She needs do a better job of explaining. 
2If you miss more than 1 class say bye to your B grade - the way she grades
3.Hard marker but gives good feedback
4.If you need to take this class, In all honesty DO NOT take it with her.
5.word limit

Nadine is a great person, however, after about week 5 she stopped making slides which would make her lectures hard to pay attention to. On a couple occasions she would at last minute cancel lecture without warning. Do-able but I won't take a course with her again.

Nadine's lectures can be boring, but I liked the readings she chose and she provided good resources to help during the course which made it not too hard. She was very helpful during an office hour when I visited, and she genuinely cares about her students. Though I wish there weren't so many handouts, a lot of paper could have been saved!

Your mark depends on your TA, lectures are just good to go to for in class writings worth marks. Had Rawia as my TA & she was absolutely amazing I couldn't believe it was her first time TA'ing! She had great office hours, was very helpful, genuinely cared, and was a fair marker. She prepared us well for each essay & is super approachable !

90% of lectures were useless, I showed up only bc there are random in class writings for marks which is ridiculous bc it only tests you ability to write fast and under pressure in less than 10 minutes?? Your mark is based off 2 essays, midterm (worth 5%), final, tutorial mark, and than small things like preparation etc worth 10%.

Teddy is one of the 7 wonders of the world. His teaching and passion are amazing and he is quite the down to earth person. Be invested in the class and you will enjoy it. I can't say enough good things about him just take the class and enjoy the ride of teaching and enlightenment. Fantastic professor and probably my favourite instructor of all-time

Matthew keeps lectures engaging and interesting. He does an amazing job explaining the readings and what is expected on assignments. For someone who hasn't taken an English course in years, he made the material easy to understand! Great prof!!
